prose:
Method provenance block
Property: HOMO–LUMO gap (energy difference between the highest-occupied and lowest-unoccupied molecular orbitals) of TEMPO, reported in eV.
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` → B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting; exact four-center integrals), as implemented in PySCF via chemkit.
Geometry provenance: single-point calculation on the user-supplied geometry file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz`; no further optimisation (notation: DFT//input-XYZ).
Environment: gas phase (no implicit or explicit solvent).
Charge and multiplicity: charge 0, doublet (multiplicity 2; unrestricted Kohn–Sham).
Software: chemkit frontier-orbitals skill (engine subcommand `frontier`) calling PySCF 2.x (see `cli_invocation` in result JSON) on the provided coordinates.
Convergence & warnings: SCF converged in 12 cycles; integrity check status `ok`, trustworthy = true; no warnings reported by the engine.
Live log & reproducibility: while running, the calculation streamed its full PySCF output to a `frontier_<timestamp>.out` file in the working directory (path echoed at launch). Key artifacts: result JSON at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpjhyxgp17/live.json` (contains energies, orbital table, SCF metadata) and the input XYZ above. The exact command executed was:
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 2 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz`

Result
The B3LYP/def2-TZVP gas-phase HOMO–LUMO gap of TEMPO (neutral doublet) is:
3.8724203 eV

No engine warnings were issued. All integrity checks passed; the result is considered trustworthy.
